_comment: OpenAI Function Calling / Gemini Function Declarations compatible schema
_usage: Pass these definitions in the 'tools' array when initializing your LLM call

functions.name: classify_hs_code
functions.description: Classify a product into Thai Customs HS Code. Returns HS code candidates ranked by confidence score with legal citations. This is decision-support output — not a binding customs ruling.

product_description.description: Product description in Thai or English. More detail = higher accuracy.

origin_country.description: 2-letter ISO country code (e.g. CN, US, JP, DE)

value_usd.description: CIF value in USD. Required for duty amount calculation.

unit.description: Unit of measurement (e.g. PCS, KG, SET)

functions.name: check_fta_rate
functions.description: Get preferential import duty rate under FTA agreements. Thailand has 13 FTAs: AFTA, ACFTA (China), AJCEP (Japan), AKFTA (Korea), AANZFTA (AU/NZ), AIFTA (India), TAFTA (Australia), TNZCEP (NZ), JTEPA (Japan bilateral), RCEP, TCFTA (Chile), TPFTA (Peru), MFN.

fta_name.description: Specific FTA to check (optional). If omitted, returns all applicable rates.

functions.name: check_oga_compliance
functions.description: Check if product requires Other Government Agency permits before Thailand import. Agencies include: FDA (food/drug/cosmetic), TISI/มอก. (standards), Dept of Agriculture, Fisheries, Livestock, AERONAUTICS (drones/aircraft), CUSTOMS special lists.
